name: say-it-plain
description: Catches jargon, hype, and marketing-speak in training content
checks_for: Banned phrases, superlatives, feature-name constructions, AI-slop sincerity tells, passive voice

name: fact-check
description: Verifies product claims, GA dates, and PM attribution
checks_for: Feature GA dates, FDE cookbook alignment, PM attribution, roadmap accuracy

name: stick-check
description: Evaluates stickiness — whether content will be remembered and applied
checks_for: Concrete examples, narrative arc, stickiness principles (Simple, Unexpected, Concrete, Credible, Emotional, Story)

name: calibrate-challenge
description: Checks difficulty calibration and prerequisite assumptions
checks_for: Assumed knowledge, scaffolding, pacing, ILT vs e-learning calibration

name: delight-check
description: Evaluates engagement, game beats, and delight principles
checks_for: Delight principles, imperfection-as-feature opportunities, game beat quality, authentic challenge

name: team-style-guide
description: Enforces Workato training team style conventions
checks_for: Banned terms, naming conventions, banned verbs, formatting rules, team-specific carve-outs
